\tzpentry{ID3565}{Phase Angle Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3565 introduces Phase Angle Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ u(\theta,\lambda,t) \;=\; -\frac{1}{R\sin\theta}\,\frac{\partial\Psi}{\partial\theta},\qquad v(\theta,\lambda,t) \;=\; \frac{1}{R}\,\frac{\partial\Psi}{\partial\lambda}. \]
